items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the 'Audit trail for attribution decisions' requirement. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or data related to this requirement. The linked use case mentions the need for an audit trail but does not provide any evidence that this functionality has been implemented or validated in the current saga run, leading to an inconclusive result.
